25.title: Friday 26 June 2026 (IST)
25.sub: TODAY · MD3 · Groups D E F · 6 matches · Thu 25 Jun ET · kickoffs 1:30am / 4:30am / 7:30am IST

matches.upsetNote: Ecuador must win — 0pts, lost MD1 0-1 CIV, drew MD2 0-0 Curacao. Over 2.5 and BTTS are the plays.
matches.ai: Ecuador (must win, 0pts) vs Germany (6pts, already qualified). Musiala: 2.8 shots/90. Over 2.5 goals 71%, BTTS 66%.

matches.upsetNote: Curacao drew 0-0 Ecuador MD2 (historic point). CIV won MD2 2-1 Germany. 18% upset.
matches.ai: Ivory Coast (-450, 6pts) vs Curacao (+900, 1pt). Amad Diallo in-form: 3 goals in 3 AFCON starts. Haller dropped from the 26-man squad.

fouls.note: 100% last 10. Netherlands dominant. Fouls every game to control midfield.
100% last 10. 6 bookings in 25 La Liga games. Card at +185 outstanding value.

matches.upsetNote: Tunisia lost 0-5 Sweden MD1, 0-4 Japan MD2. Eliminated. Only 8% upset.
matches.ref: 📋 Tunisia defensively fragile. NED avg 9+ corners in dominant wins.
matches.ai: Netherlands (-500, won both MD1+MD2) vs Tunisia (eliminated, 0pts). Depay: 3.2 shots/90. Gravenberch: 100% fouls L10.

fouls.note: Physical Arsenal striker. 100% last 10.
Japan captain breaks Swedish transitions. 82% last 10.

shots.cl: Real Sociedad · Japan · RW · Mitoma OUT

matches.upsetNote: Japan beat Germany WC22. Mitoma INJURED OUT full tournament. 42% upset.
matches.ai: Japan (Mitoma OUT, beat Tunisia 4-0 MD2) vs Sweden (lost 0-5 Netherlands MD1). Isak: 3.1 shots/90. Gyokeres: 100% fouls L10.

fouls.note: 2.0 fouls/90 in WC qualifying, 100% last 10. Elimination game elevates aggression.

matches.upsetNote: Turkey lost both MD1+MD2, 0 goals scored. Nothing to lose — 39% upset.
matches.ai: USA (-135, already qualified Group D winners) vs Turkey (+340, lost MD1+MD2, elimination). Yuksek: 2.0 fouls/90, 100% L10.

matches.upsetNote: Paraguay beat Turkey 1-0 in MD2. Australia won MD1 2-0 Turkey. Both need a win — 45% Paraguay upset.
matches.ai: Australia (-145, won MD1 2-0 Turkey) vs Paraguay (+400, won MD2 1-0 Turkey). Both need points.

26.title: Saturday 27 June 2026 (IST)
26.sub: MD3 · Groups G H I · 6 matches · Fri 26 Jun ET · kickoffs 12:30am / 5:30am / 8:30am IST

fouls.note: Physical target man fouled regularly by centre-backs. Norway starter.
100% last 10 La Liga + Nations League. France anchor DM commits fouls structurally.

matches.upsetNote: Norway are +127 — near evens vs France. 38% upset. Back SOT props over the result.
matches.ai: Norway (+127, 6pts, Haaland 4 WC goals) vs France (-333, 6pts, Mbappe 4 WC goals). Haaland: 2.2 SOT/game. Mbappe: 3.79 shots/90. Tchouameni: 100% fouls L10.

fouls.note: Senegal forward dribbles into contact and draws fouls. Starter.
Senegal anchor DM. 100% last 10. Physical presence vs Iraq.

matches.upsetNote: Senegal lost MD1+MD2. Iraq lost MD1+MD2. 28% Iraq upset.
matches.ai: Senegal (-230) vs Iraq (+650). Gueye: 1.5 fouls/90, 100% last 10. Mane: 2.6 shots/90.

fouls.note: Among the most-fouled players in La Liga. Defenders chop him down. Spain starter.
Uruguay nailed DM. 2.44 fouls/90 in the PL with a weak discipline rating. Near-lock for 1+ fouls.

matches.upsetNote: Spain drew 0-0 Cabo Verde MD1 but bounced back 4-0 Saudi MD2. 20% upset.
matches.ref: 📋 Live bet: Spain next goal if 0-0 at 25 mins.
matches.ai: Spain (-270, won MD2 4-0 Saudi) vs Uruguay (+700). Yamal: 2.9 shots/90, 18 LL goals.

fouls.note: Saudi talisman and starter, dribbles into contact and draws fouls.
Cabo Verde only top-5-league player, anchors the defence and starts every match. Commits fouls defending.

matches.upsetNote: Low-pressure match for both. Under 2.5 goals likely.
matches.ai: Cabo Verde vs Saudi Arabia. Both without top-2 pressure. Under 2.5 goals likely.

fouls.note: Egypt captain dribbles inside and is fouled constantly. Nailed starter.
Egypt midfield enforcer. 2.1 fouls/game AFCON. 100% last 10. Yellow at +175 great value.

matches.upsetNote: Belgium drew 0-0 Iran MD2. Egypt won MD2 3-1 NZ. 36% Iran upset.
matches.ai: Egypt (64%, won MD2 3-1 NZ) vs Iran (drew MD2 0-0 Belgium). Salah: 2.85 shots/90. Fathy: 2.1 fouls/game, 100% last 10.

fouls.note: Belgium playmaker fouled to stop transitions. Starter.
NZ midfield enforcer. 1.7 fouls/game, 6 yellows. 100% last 10. Yellow at +165 outstanding value.

matches.upsetNote: NZ drew 2-2 Iran MD1, lost 1-3 Egypt MD2. Belgium drew 0-0 Iran MD2. 38% NZ upset.
matches.ai: NZ (+500) vs Belgium (-200, drew 0-0 Iran MD2). Stamenic: 1.7 fouls/game, 100% last 10. De Bruyne: 2.1 shots/90.

27.title: Sunday 28 June 2026 (IST)
27.sub: MD3 · Groups J K L · 6 matches · Sat 27 Jun ET · kickoffs 2:30am / 5:00am / 7:30am IST

fouls.note: Perennially among the most-fouled players. Jordan will foul to stop him. Argentina starter.
One of most foul-prone CBs in PL. Jordan pace forwards test him constantly. 90% last 10.

matches.upsetNote: Jordan won MD2 1-0 Algeria upset. Argentina won both MD1+MD2. Only 9% upset.
matches.ai: Argentina (-800, Messi hat-trick MD1) vs Jordan (+900). Messi: 2.8 shots/90. Romero: 1.7 fouls/90, 90% last 10.

fouls.note: Algeria captain and dribbler, cut down by fullbacks. Starter.
Bayern relentless presser and nailed Austria starter. 1.31 fouls/90 and 9 bookings this season.

matches.upsetNote: Algeria won MD2 2-1 Jordan upset. Austria won MD1 3-1 Jordan. 40% Algeria upset.
matches.ai: Austria (-185, won MD1 3-1 Jordan) vs Algeria (+350, won MD2 2-1 Jordan). Both need win.

fouls.note: Among the most-fouled in the Bundesliga, dribbles into contact. Colombia starter.
Starts alongside Vitinha in Portugal’s midfield, screens the defence and commits fouls every game. (Ruben Neves is not in the starting XI.)

matches.upsetNote: Portugal won MD2 5-0 Uzbekistan Ronaldo brace. Colombia drew MD2 1-1. 25% upset.
matches.ai: Portugal (-210, won MD2 5-0 Ronaldo brace) vs Colombia (+600). Ronaldo: 4.2 shots/90. Joao Neves (DM) starts and fouls; Ruben Neves is not in the XI.

fouls.note: Uzbekistan young CB at Man City, aggressive in the challenge. Starter.
DR Congo captain and record cap-holder. Plays every minute at CB as a physical defender. Reliable 1+ fouls.

matches.upsetNote: Uzbekistan lost MD2 0-5. DR Congo lost MD2 0-1. Both desperate. 42% Uzbekistan upset.
matches.ai: Uzbekistan vs DR Congo. Both eliminated from top 2. Low-pressure match.

fouls.note: One of the most-fouled players in the Premier League. England starter.
1.8 fouls/90 in PL. 10/10 last matches. England DM vs Panama = near certainty.

matches.upsetNote: Panama lost both MD1+MD2. England won both. 10% upset — best Saturday banker.
matches.ai: England (-600, won MD1+MD2) vs Panama (lost both). Kane: 4.5 shots/90. Rice: 1.8 fouls/90, 100% last 10.

fouls.note: Ghana dribbler fouled often when driving at defenders. Starter.
At 40 Modric draws fouls through ball retention. Ghana will hack him constantly.

matches.upsetNote: Ghana won MD1 1-0 Panama. Croatia won MD2 1-0 Panama. 35% Ghana upset.
matches.ai: Croatia (-200, won MD2 1-0 Panama) vs Ghana (won MD1 1-0 Panama). Musa: 4.1 shots/90. Modric fouls drawn 100% last 10.
